name: Guidewire Software, Inc.
description: Guidewire Software, Inc. provides a technology platform for property and casualty (P&C) insurers globally. The company's software platform combines core operations, digital engagement, analytics, and AI applications to enable insurers to run, differentiate, and grow their businesses. Offered primarily as a cloud service, Guidewire's solutions help insurers enhance operational efficiency, improve underwriting performance, and deliver digital experiences to policyholders and agents.
